Class Win32PhysicalMemoryFFM

java.lang.Object
oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32PhysicalMemory
oshi.driver.windows.wmi.Win32PhysicalMemoryFFM
@ThreadSafe public final class Win32PhysicalMemoryFFM extends oshi.driver.common.windows.wmi.Win32PhysicalMemory
Utility to query WMI class Win32_PhysicalMemory using FFM.
